revision.text:
{{pagebanner | Helsinki Karhupuisto banner.jpg |caption=Karhupuisto in the summer |pgname=Inner East of Helsinki }} '''Inner East''' comprises the parts of [[Helsinki]] east of the railway, north of Pitkäsilta, south of freeways [[Highway 4 (Finland)|4]] and 45 and west of Kulosaari. In this part of the city you can see districts of old wooden houses and postmodern, blocky concrete districts built as the "city districts of the future" in the 1970s. ==Get in== {{Mapframe|60.19185|24.95986|zoom=12|height=400|width=400}} Most '''buses''' to and from the eastern parts of Vantaa (including the airport bus 615 to the city centre) and north-eastern Helsinki drive along Hämeentie, the major artery of this district. '''Trams''' 1, 3, 6, 7 and 9 as well as the '''Metro''' (get off at Hakaniemi, Sörnäinen or Kalasatama) all bring you to the Inner east from the city centre. From Western Helsinki, catch tram 2 or 8 from Töölö or tram 6, 7 or 9 from the south-west. Motorways 4 from [[Lahti]] and 45 from [[Tuusula]] enter Helsinki here, as does highway 170 from [[Porvoo]]. If coming by '''train''', {{marker |type=go |name=Pasila Railway Station |url=https://www.vr.fi/en/railway-stations-and-routes/pasila |lat=60.1987 |long=24.9333 |image=Pasila railway station and the Mall of Tripla in Keski-Pasila, Helsinki, Finland, 2021 July.jpg }} serve the Inner East and all trains to Helsinki, both local and long-distance. ==See== [[File:Karhupuisto Helsinki.jpg|thumbnail|Karhupuisto]] [[File:Waterfall (5594892420).jpg|thumbnail|Vanhakaupunki rapids in the winter]] The old wooden houses are found in parts of {{Marker |type=see |lat=60.21524 |long=24.94903 |name=Käpylä}} (take tram 1 or 1A to its northern terminus) and {{Marker |type=see |lat=60.19305 |long=24.95677 |name=Vallila}} (in the area between Sturenkatu, Teollisuuskatu, Hämeentie and Päijänteentie). The blocky concrete districts are fpund in {{Marker |type=see |lat=60.19878 |long=24.94015 |name=Itä-Pasila }} (east of Pasila railway station) and {{Marker |type=see |lat=60.17942 |long=24.96066 |name=Merihaka}} (east of Hakaniemi). * {{see | name=Alppipuisto | alt= | url=https://www.myhelsinki.fi/see-and-do/sights/alppipuisto-park | email= | address= | lat=60.19044 | long=24.93755 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Located on the west side of the Linnanmäki amusement park, this beautiful park is a hidden gem during the summer due to the many free concerts and other events that are held there throughout the summer months. }} * {{see | name=Bear park | alt=Karhupuisto | url= | email= | address= | lat=60.183988 | long=24.952464 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=A cozy small park on the hill next to Kallio church and one of Kallio's symbols. The park got its name from the bear statue in the middle of it. }} * {{see | name=Church of Kallio | alt=Kallion kirkko/Berghälls kyrka | url=https://www.helsinginseurakunnat.fi/en/index/kallionkirkko.html.stx | email= | address= | lat=60.184155 | long=24.949338 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours=Tu-F 12:00-18:00, Sa Su 10:00-18:00 | price=Free | content=On top of the hill at the end of Siltasaarenkatu. The church is built of grey granite (1912) and its massive looks dominate the view from Hakaniemi. It was designed by Finnish architect Lars Sonck. The church has both baroque and French romantic organs and concerts are organized frequently. The bells ring at noon and 19:00 with a tune composed by Jean Sibelius. }} * {{see | name=Church of St. Paul | alt=Paavalinkirkko | url=https://www.helsinginseurakunnat.fi/en/paavalinseurakunta/artikkelit/n8a1h3lk3 | email= | address= | lat=60.197280 | long=24.960128 | directions=tram 6, 8 | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=A church from the 1930s built of red tiles, one of the first landmarks one will see when driving into Helsinki from Lahti. }} * {{see | name=Technology museum | alt=Tekniikan museo | url=http://tekniikanmuseo.fi/in-english/ | email= | address=Viikintie 1 | lat=60.21650 | long=24.98270 | directions=Vanhakaupunki | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price=€6 | content=A small museum dedicated to technology, machines and industry. }} * {{see | name=Tropicario | alt= | url=http://www.tropicario.com/eng_index.html | email= | address=Sturenkatu 27 | lat=60.193795 | long=24.955946 | directions=tram 1, 6, 7B | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=10:00-19:00 | price=€12 | content=Watch some of those tropical animals you wouldn't want to bite or sting you in the indoor terrarium Tropicario. }} * {{see | name=Vanhakaupunki and Vanhakaupunki rapids | alt= | url=https://www.myhelsinki.fi/en/see-and-do/neighbourhoods/arabianranta-vanhankaupunginkoski-and-viikki/vanhankaupunginkoski-and | email= | address= | lat=60.216109 | long=24.979763 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=The place where Vantaa river flows into the sea was the place where Helsinki was founded in 1550. Despite its name "Old Town", don't expect to find any medieval buildings there, as the area was devastated by a fire and a plague outbreak and subsequently the city was moved south to its current location. Nevertheless, the site of where Helsinki was founded is marked by a small memorial and nearby there's the site of the city's first church, standing from 1550 to 1639. The nearby rapids are also worth seeing. }} * {{see | name=Worker Housing Museum | alt=Työväenasuntomuseo | url=http://workerhousingmuseum.fi | email= | address=Kirstinkuja 4 | lat=60.1894 | long=24.9458 | directions=tram 1, 3, 9 | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=June to late October: W-Su 11:00-17:00 | price=Free | lastedit=2016-07-07 | content=Built for the city's employees and their families in the early 20th century, nowadays the house is a museum where every room is a snapshot of the inhabitants' everyday life during different decades from the 1920s to the 1980s. Visits by guided tours which are free, start about every 15-20 minutes depending on how many visitors have arrived, and are conducted in Finnish, English (whenever foreign travellers show up) and possibly other languages too. }} * {{see | name=Kalasatama | alt= | url=https://www.myhelsinki.fi/see-and-do-neighbourhoods/kalasatama-kulosaari-and-mustikkamaa/kalasatama | email= | address= | lat=60.1842 | long=24.9803 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours= | price= | lastedit=2023-12-21 | content=Literally "fish harbour", this is a new seafront neighbourhood which has an interesting brick touch to it. Not a typical tourist destination, but some architecture lovers might find the place interesting. Also home to a big, crazy statue of a Siberian Jay. A new shopping and living complex Redi has been built there, with the first phase opened in autumn 2018. }} * {{see | name=Majakka | alt= | url= | email= | address=Kalasatamankatu 9A | lat=60.187601 | long=24.979754 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | lastedit=2022-02-06 | content= Literally "lighthouse", the Majakka tower is 134 metres (440 ft) tall high-rise building, known as the first skyscraper of Finland. It was inaugurated in 2019. }} * {{see | name=Torkkelinmäki | alt= | url= | email= | address= | lat=60.186 | long=24.956 | directions=Closest tram stops Karhupuisto, Lintulahti, Helsinginkatu, Sörnäinen (M) | phone= | tollfree= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q2749924 | lastedit=2022-11-19 | content=The green parks and small apartment buildings on the top of a hill and in the center of Finland's densest-populated neighbourhood are protected as an exemplary early-20th century working-class cultural environment. Around, you will find a former university at Franzéninkatu 13 and a former technical school at Agricolankatu 1-3, as well as small cafes, bars and restaurants. }} ==Do== [[File:Linnanrollerc.JPG|thumbnail|[[Linnanmäki]]]] [[File:Illuminated merry-go-round at Linnanmäki lights carnival 2014.jpg|thumb|right|The annual closing ceremony of Linnanmäki features illuminated rides.]] [[File:Helsinki Fair Centre entrance during World Gymnaestrada 2015.jpg|thumb|right|Helsinki Fair Grounds]] [[File:Kallio Kukkii samba parade 2014 3.jpg|thumb|right|The samba parade at Kallio Kukkii]] * {{do | name=Helsinki Fair Grounds | alt=Helsingin Messukeskus | url=http://www.finnexpo.fi/en/Pages/EventCalendar.aspx | email= | address=Messuaukio 1 | lat=60.203423 | long=24.935619 | directions=in Pasila, east of the railway | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=For many business travellers the reason to visit Helsinki, but there are also some events around the year that aren't exclusively geared towards professionals like the American car show in April, the book fair in October, ski expo in November and the travel expo in January. }} * {{do | name=Kallio Kukkii | alt= | url=http://www.kallionkulttuuriverkosto.fi/kalliokukkii/ | email= | address= | lat=60.1875 | long=24.9581 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Parade at 13:00-14:00 | price=Free of charge | wikidata= | lastedit=2015-03-10 | content=A cultural summer festival held in the bohemian district of Kallio not very far from the city centre. Held over a week in middle May. Various art galleries, workshops and street art performances. Culminates in a samba parade on Sunday, held by Império do Papagaio as their final practice before the main Samba Carnaval in the city centre. }} * {{do | name=Kulttuuritalo | alt=Helsinki Hall of Culture | url=http://kulttuuritalo.fi/en/home/ | email= | address=Sturenkatu 4 | lat=60.18827 | long=24.94438 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q6305770 | content=The Helsinki Hall of Culture is a concert hall designed by Alvar Aalto in the 1950s. Since its opening, many world-famous artists and groups such as Jimi Hendrix, AC/DC, Tina Turner, Iron Maiden and Lady Gaga have held concerts there. }} * {{do | name=[[Linnanmäki]] | alt= | url=http://www.linnanmaki.fi/en | email= | address= | lat=60.188999 | long=24.940244 | directions=Tram 3, 8, bus 23 | phone= | tollfree= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q1635596 | content=The oldest amusement park in Finland, famous for its wooden roller coaster. Entrance to the park is free of charge, all-day passes €42. Open only during the summer, however the adjacent '''[https://www.visitsealife.com/helsinki/en/ Sea Life]''' aquarium and the '''[http://www.peacockteatteri.fi/www/index.php Peacock theatre]''' (not a traditional theatre but rather a venue for musicals and slightly Las Vegas-like shows) at Tivolikuja 1 is open throughout the year.
In middle October, the amusement park holds a week-long closing ceremony where just about everything, particularly the rides, is illuminated with colourful lighting. The ceremony holds live music events in late evening and there is a fireworks show at the very end just before the park closes down for the winter. }} * {{do | name=Suvilahti | alt= | url=http://www.suvilahti.fi | email= | address=Sörnäisten rantatie 22 | lat=60.18665 | long=24.97193 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q54867728 | content=A former power plant, nowadays a centre for alternative culture that hosts a circus and some exhibitions. The famous metal festival Tuska at the turn of June and July and electronic music festival Flow in August are held on the premises. }} ** {{do | name=Suvilahti DIY | alt= | url=https://www.myhelsinki.fi/see-and-do/activities/suvilahti-diy-skatepark | email= | address=Kaasutehtaankatu 1 | lat=60.1857 | long=24.974 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours= | price= | image=Skatepark in Suvilahti, Helsinki, Finland, 2018.jpg | wikidata=Q108815307 | content=A popular skatepark built by the skaters themselves. The place has even been used by many internationally famous skaters, such as Tony Hawk. It has been under threat since 2017, losing an appeal in 2024. }} * {{do | name=Tokoinranta | alt= | url= | email= | address= | lat=60.18008 | long=24.94105 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q11897969 | content=A park north-west of Hakaniemi, which in August turns into an outdoor scene during the Helsingin Juhlaviikot cultural festival. Check out the City theatre, and if you understand Finnish or Swedish, go see a theatre performance. }} ===Sports=== [[File:BraheField.jpg|thumbnail|Brahenkenttä]] * {{do | name=Brahenkenttä | alt=Brahe field | url= | email= | address= | lat=60.18750 | long=24.94965 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q2923539 | content=An open sports pitch in northern Kallio where you can play football (soccer) in the summer and ice hockey or bandy in the winter or watch a home game of the Finnish bandy league team HIFK. }} * {{do | alt=Mäkelänrinteen uimahalli | name=Mäkelänrinne swimming hall | url=https://www.urheiluhallit.fi/fi/paikat/makelanrinne.html | email= | address=Mäkelänkatu 49 | lat=60.199561 | long=24.948146 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | wikidata=Q18660917 | content=Indoor swimming pool which has also been used for international competitions. Great if you feel like swimming in the winter but don't care for the traditional Finnish "hole in the ice" swimming. }} * {{do | name=Urheilutalo | alt= | url=https://www.urheiluhallit.fi/fi/paikat/kallio.html | email= | address=Helsinginkatu 25 | lat=60.18671 | long=24.94717 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | wikidata= | content=The "Sports house" offers swimming, bowling or exercising. }} ===Saunas=== * {{do | name=Arlan sauna | alt=Sauna Arla | url=http://www.arlansauna.net/ | email= | address=Kaarlenkatu 15 | lat=60.18660 | long=24.95183 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price=€9 for adults, students €7 | wikidata= | content=Old public sauna in Kallio. Separate saunas for men and women. Washing service and traditional bloodletting (''kuppaus'') also available. }} * {{do | name=Kotiharjun sauna | alt= | url=https://www.kotiharjunsauna.fi/en | email= | address=Harjutorinkatu 1 | lat=60.18650 | long=24.95743 | directions= | phone=+358 9 753-1535 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Tu–Su 14:00–20:00 (bathtime until 21:30) | price=€12 for adults, students & pensioners €8.5, towel €3 extra. | wikidata=Q18660201 | lastedit=2024-09-22 | content=This is the last wood-burning public sauna in Helsinki. Separate saunas for men and women. There's a good chance you'll find a top level chess match in the dressing room. Don't miss cooling off outside, especially in winter. On Saturdays you'll find bachelor parties (Kotiharju is pretty near to Kallio's nightlife). }} * {{do | name=Sauna Hermanni | alt= | url=http://www.saunahermanni.fi/ | email= | address=Hämeentie 63 | lat=60.19346 | long=24.96519 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price=€8 for adults, students €5 | wikidata=Q18661887 | content= }} * {{do | name=Sauna Vogue | alt= | url=http://www.saunavogue.net/ | email= | address=Sturenkatu 27 A (5th floor) | lat=60.19380 | long=24.95600 | directions=in Vallila district | phone=+358 44-237-4935 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=W–Su 16:00–22:00 | price=Entry {{EUR|23}}, under 25 years €18 | wikidata= | content=Only gay sauna in Finland. }} ==Buy== ===Design=== * {{buy | name=Arabia Factory Shop | alt= | url=http://www.arabia.fi | email= | address=Hämeentie 135 | lat=60.20940 | long=24.97645 | directions=Tram 6 & 8 terminus | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M-F 10:00-20:00, Sa Su 10:00-16:00 | price= | content=Factory outlet for '''Arabia''' ceramics and '''Iittala''' glassware, best known for selling slightly defective goods at modestly discounted prices. }} * {{buy | name=Vallilan Akseli | alt= | url=http://www.akseli-showroom.fi | email= | address=Lemuntie 3-5 | lat=60.19612 | long=24.95108 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Here you can watch and buy "design"-furniture and kitchen utilities. }} * {{buy | name=Moko market and café | alt= | url=http://moko.fi/en | email= | address=Vilhonvuorenkatu 11 | lat=60.18641 | long=24.96707 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | price= | hours=M-F 09:00-17:00, Sa 10:00-16:00 | content=Things to furnish and decorate your home of the more expensive kind as well as organic products. They have a café too, serving sandwiches, good hamburgers and a range of beverages – on Saturdays you can enjoy brunch there. Moko has another branch in Punavuori in the southwest of the city. }} ===Malls=== * {{buy | name=Kauppakeskus Arabia | alt= | url=http://www.kauppakeskusarabia.fi | email= | address=Hämeentie 111 | lat=60.20295 | long=24.96822 | directions=tram 6 and 8 | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=A shopping mall in northwestern Helsinki with two supermarkets and some speciality stores. }} * {{buy | name=REDI | alt= | url=https://www.redi.fi | email= | address=Hermannin rantatie 5 | lat=60.1872 | long=24.9786 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | lastedit=2018-09-25 | content=Shopping mall opened in September 2018, built around the Kalasatama metro station. Redi is said to be the most labyrinthine shopping centre in Europe, mostly because the metro tracks cuts the mall in half, so that is by itself an interesting thing to experience. The ''Majakka'' building on top of the mall is the second tallest skyscraper in the Nordic countries (after ''Turning Torso'' in [[Malmö]]). }} * Adjacent to the Pasila railway station is the Tripla shopping mall, as it's west of the railway it is listed in [[Helsinki/West]]. ===Markets=== [[File:Hakaniemen kauppahalli2008b.jpg|thumbnail|Hakaniemi market hall]] * {{buy | name=Hakaniemi Market Hall and Open-Air Market | alt=Hakaniemen kauppahalli, Hakaniemen tori | url= | email= | address= | lat=60.17983 | long=24.95132 | directions=Metro: Hakaniemi. Tram: 1, 1A, 3, 6, 7, 9 | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=A busy indoor market hall and outdoor market square frequented by locals, this is where you can find fresh produce and specialities or have a cup of coffee or a small meal. The open-air market offers fresh vegetables and seasonal products, and a flea market on the first Sunday each month at which point there will be a much greater number of food and goods vendors from all over Finland. Walking up Hämeentie from Hakaniemi market, you'll find several African, Middle Eastern, Indian and Asian grocery stores. }} ===Record stores=== * {{buy | name=Black & White | alt= | url=http://www.blackandwhite.fi/index.php?id_cms=13&controller=cms | email= | address=Toinen Linja 1 | lat=60.18146 | long=24.94923 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price=€cheap | content=Rock. Many genres. Very recommended. }} * {{buy | name=Hippie Shake records | alt= | url=http://www.hippieshakerecords.com/ | email= | address=Hämeentie 1 | lat=60.18050 | long=24.95216 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Rare 1960/70s rock and hard rock. }} * {{buy | name=Goofin Records | alt= | url=http://www.goofinrecords.com/shop/ | email= | address=Hämeentie 46 | lat=60.18637 | long=24.96101 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Rockabilly. }} ===Other stores=== * {{buy | name=Dos Tecolotes | alt= | url=https://www.facebook.com/DosTecolotes | email=info@dostecolotes.com | address=Hämeentie 6 | lat=60.180825 | long=24.952119 | directions=easy to spot by the big Mexican flag hanging on the door | phone=+358 50-471-3132 | tollfree= | hours=Tu-Su 12:00-18:00 mostly, M closed | price= | lastedit=2024-10-20 | content=Dos Tecolotes (Spanish for "two eagle-owls") sells Mexican foods and foodstuffs that the owners import directly from Mexico. }} * {{buy | name=Helsingin Pantti | alt= | url=https://pantti.fi/en/toimipiste/helsinki-sornainen/ | email=sornainen@helsinginpantti.fi | address=Helsinginkatu 1 | lat=60.1878 | long=24.9598 | directions=in Sörnäinen | phone=+358 9 2705-3040 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M–F 10:00–17:00 | price= | content=A pawn shop. }} * {{buy | name=Poromagia | alt= | url=https://lautapelit.poromagia.com/en/ | email=info@poromagia.com | address=Hämeentie 1 | lat=60.18042 | long=24.95205 | directions=in Hakaniemi | phone=+358 50-355-2252 (store), +358 40-669-2227 (webstore) | tollfree= | hours=M–F 12:00–17:00, Sa 10:00–17:00, Su 12:00–16:00 | price= | wikidata= | lastedit=2024-04-07 | content=A full-service board, card and miniature game store. }} ==Eat== ===Budget=== [[File:Lunch at Pihka Lintulahti.jpg|thumb|right|Buffet lunch at a cafeteria]] * {{eat | name=Student's restaurant at Arcada | alt= | url=http://www.amica.fi/en/restaurants/ravintolat-kaupungeittain/helsinki/arcada/ | email= | address=Jan-Magnus Janssonin aukio 1 | lat=60.20150 | long=24.96617 | directions=from the main entrance, walk up the stairs and turn right | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Food around lunchtime, coffee, sandwich and cakes all day | price=Around €5 without a student card | content=Like most other university campuses, the Swedish-language polytechnic Arcada has a lunch restaurant operated by Amica. Even if you aren't a student, the prices for lunch are quite cheap. }} * {{eat | name=Blinit | url=http://eat.fi/en/helsinki/blini | email=raritet.international@gmail.com | address=Sturenkatu 9 | lat=60.187908 | long=24.945031 | directions=opposite Kulttuuritalo | phone=+358 46-810-6161 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M-Th 11:00-21:00, F-Su 11:00-22:00 | price=Lunch menu €7 | content=Another Russian eatery specialized in ''blini'' with different fillings. Also ''pelmeny'' and soups (''borscht'' specially recommended) on daily offer. }} * {{eat | name=Döner Kallio | alt= | url=https://www.facebook.com/DonerKallio {{dead link|December 2020}} | email= | address=Fleminginkatu 23 | lat=60.18868 | long=24.95324 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} * {{eat | name=Pelmenit | url=http://eat.fi/en/helsinki/pelmenit | email= | address=Kustaankatu 7 | lat=60.18875 | long=24.95613 | directions=Close to Sörnäinen metro station | phone=+358 41-783-9069 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M-Th 11:00-17:00, F-Su 10:00-22:00 | price=Around €10 for a dish | content=Serves ''pelmeny'' (Russian dumplings), ''blini'' (Russian crepes), soups and salads. The menu depends on the mood of the Russian owner. }} * {{eat | name=Pihka Lintulahti | alt= | url=https://www.pihka.fi/pihka-lintulahti/ | email=lintulahti@pihka.fi | address=Lintulahdenkatu 10 | lat=60.18405 | long=24.96274 | directions=in an office building near Sörnäisten rantatie | phone=+358 50-462-8284 | tollfree= | hours=M–F 08:00–15:00, Sa Su closed | price=Lunch buffet €11 | lastedit=2021-09-08 | content=A lunch restaurant. Buffet lunch available on weekdays. }} ===Mid-range=== [[File:Virtaintie Puu Vallila.JPG|thumbnail|Virtaintie street in Puu-Vallila district]] [[File:Daredevil Burger.jpg|thumb|right|A hamburger]] * {{eat | name=Almas | alt= | url=https://ravintolaalmas.fi | email=info@ravintolaalmas.fi | address=Vinsentinaukio 4 | lat=60.1801 | long=24.9745 | directions=in Sompasaari | phone=+358 50-512-3411 | tollfree= | hours= | price=€15-20 | wikipedia= | wikidata= | lastedit=2024-05-26 | content=A Persian restaurant. }} * {{eat | name=Bites Burgers | alt= | url=http://www.bites.fi | email= | address=Nokiantie 2–4 | lat=60.1956 | long=24.9511 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours= | price=€10-12 | wikipedia= | wikidata= | lastedit=2019-07-25 | content=Tasty burgers made to order, with a regular, vegan, vegetarian and special option that can be further customised. They have a good selection of sodas and craft beer. They also have restaurants in [[Helsinki/Kamppi and Southwest|Kamppi]] and the [[Helsinki/Central|Kaivopiha mall]]. }} * {{eat | name=Bunthan's Food | alt= | url=https://bunthans-food.fi | email=bunthan.food@gmail.com | address=Sompasaarenlaituri 22 | lat=60.1791 | long=24.9721 | directions=in Sompasaari | phone=+358 50-471-3928 | tollfree= | hours= | price=€10-15 | wikipedia= | wikidata= | lastedit=2024-05-26 | content=A Thai restaurant. }} * {{eat | name=Cella | alt= | url=https://www.ravintolacella.fi/ | email= | address=Fleminginkatu 15 | lat=60.18644 | long=24.95348 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours= | price= | content=Established 1969, this is one of the oldest restaurants in the Kallio district, serving classic Finnish food with lots of grease and salt. For a "real" restaurant (not fast food) in Helsinki it's reasonably priced, around €10-20 for main dishes. The chef himself often serves the food, complete with a sexist joke or an insult, and may even force feed you the leftovers if you don't finish your meal! Also serves as a pub with a decent selection of beers, ciders and single malts. }} * {{eat | name=Freeesh | alt= | url=https://www.freeesh.fi | email=contact@freeesh.fi | address=Työpajankatu 6 | lat=60.188786 | long=24.975343 | directions= | phone=+358 41-486-8620 | tollfree= | hours=M-Th 11:00-15:00, F 11:00-19:00, Sa 12:00-19:00, Su 12:00-19:00 | price=Lunch buffet €13.90, evening and weekend buffet €16.90 | lastedit=2022-06-05 | content=A sushi buffet restaurant in the Kalasatama neighbourhood. The sushi is fresh and tasty. The restaurant is very popular and a bit small, so prepare for queues. Soft drinks included in the price but alcoholic drinks cost extra. }} * {{eat | name=Grand Georgia | alt=Ravintolalaiva Wäiski | url=http://grandgeorgia.fi/fin/ | email= | address=Hakaniemenranta 11 | lat=60.17800 | long=24.95278 | directions= | phone=+358 10-420-3600 | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Wäiski is the only year-round restaurant boat in Helsinki. You cannot travel anywhere with it, as it is firmly docked at Hakaniemi Pier. Both indoor and outdoor seating and fair prices. However the boat is sometimes rented for private parties and conferences and in that case you need to go elsewhere. A Georgian restaurant since 2018. }} * {{eat | name=Ravintola Karhunpesä | alt= | url=http://www.ravintolakarhunpesa.fi/ | email= | address=Alppikatu 9 | lat=60.18532 | long=24.94362 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} * {{eat | name=Bar Loosister | alt= | url=https://barloosister.fi/?lang=en | email=info@barloosister.fi | address=Hämeentie 50 | lat=60.18683 | long=24.96106 | directions= | phone=+358 44-791-3116 | tollfree= | hours=14:00-00:00 mostly | price=Burgers around {{EUR|16}} | lastedit=2021-09-06 | content=Good selection of burgers and beers on tap. Lunch buffet on weekdays, à la carte dishes on evenings and Saturdays. Note that the "XXX hot" chili sauce at the buffet really is hot. }} * {{eat | name=Pastelaria Brazil | alt= | url= | email= | address=Opastinsilta 2 | lat=60.19970 | long=24.94270 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours=M–F 10:30–18:00, Sa 11:00–18:00, Su 12:00–17:00 | price= | lastedit=2022-12-15 | content=A Brazilian restaurant. }} * {{eat | name=Pronto Pizzeria | alt= | url=https://www.pizzapronto.fi/hameentie | email=info@pizzapronto.fi | address=Hämeentie 21 | lat=60.186249 | long=24.96158 | directions= | phone=+358 40-254-6484 | tollfree= | hours=11:00 to 24:00 mostly | price=Pizza about €16 | lastedit=2024-11-02 | content=A nice pizzeria on the street Hämeentie. The clientele at lunch is primarily blue-collar workers and the portions are sized accordingly. }} ===Splurge=== [[File:Interior of restaurant Zorbas.jpg|thumb|right|Restaurant interior]] * {{eat | name=Taverna Zorbas | alt= | url=http://zorbas.fi | email= | address=Läntinen Brahenkatu 4 | lat=60.18758 | long=24.94803 | directions=next to Brahenkenttä sports field | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price=€20–30 | content=Kallio's favourite Greek restaurant. }} ==Drink== ===Cafes=== * {{drink | name=IPI Kulmakuppila | alt= | url=https://ipikulmakuppila.fi/en/ | email=kuppila@ipikulmakuppila.fi | address=Porthaninkatu 13 | lat=60.18327 | long=24.95380 | directions=in Kallio | phone=+358 45-616-4776 | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} * {{drink | name=Kahvila Sävy | alt= | url=http://www.facebook.com/pages/Kahvila-Savy/120657571290663 | email= | address=Kinaporinkatu 1 | lat=60.18822 | long=24.96097 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Small, retro style café with excellent coffee from a Finnish roastery. There are only a few seats in the former barbershop, next to the Sörnäinen metro. Also peculiar percolators for sale. }} * {{drink | name=Kipsari | alt= | url=http://www.kipsari.com/ | email= | address=Hämeentie 135 E | lat=60.20863 | long=24.97626 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content=Student cafe at the University of Art and Industrial Design in Arabia. Relaxed atmosphere with live music and DJs at times. Not open during summer when the school's out. }} * {{drink | name=Meli Cafe and Bakery | alt=CaffeMeli | url= | email= | address=Helsinginkatu 11 | lat=60.18745 | long=24.95659 | directions=in Harju | phone=+358 50-440-8228 | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} ===Bars and pubs=== [[File:Suonionkatu Kallio Helsinki Finland 06 Dec 2008.jpg|thumbnail|Suonionkatu on a wintry afternoon]] Drinking in Helsinki (and in Finland generally) is relatively expensive, wherefore the Kallio district with its lower prices in pubs and bars has established itself as a party district. There are lots of pubs to choose from, just walk along the parallel running Helsinginkatu or Vaasankatu; the latter one was partly changed into a pedestrian zone in summer 2013. You can reach Kallio from the centre by walking, by tram (lines 1, 3, 6 or 7B) or by metro (get off at Hakaniemi and walk uphill, or Sörnäinen, and head west). Nearly all bars in Kallio have to close at the latest at 02:00, whereas in city centre there are many that are open until 04:00, reinforcing Kallio's status as a 'party district'. * {{drink | name=Pub Heinähattu | alt= | url= | email= | address=Vaasankatu 23 | lat=60.18847 | long=24.95504 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M–F 16:00–02:00, Sa Su 14:00–02:00 | price= | content= }} * {{drink | name=Iltakoulu | alt= | url= | email= | address=Vaasankatu 5 | lat=60.18835 | long=24.96048 | directions= | phone=+358 9 711-611 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Su–Th 12:00–00:00, F Sa 12:00–02:00 | price= | content= }} *{{drink | name=Juttutupa | alt= | url=http://www.juttutupa.fi | email=juttutupa@graniittiravintolat.fi | address=Säästöpankinranta 5 | lat=60.17919 | long=24.94783 | directions= | phone=+358 20-742-4240 | tollfree= | hours=M–W 10:30–22:00, Th 10:30–23:00, F 10:30–01:00, Sa 12:00–01:00 | price= | content=Helsinki's (probably) oldest still operational pub, housed in the "workers' house", a nice old granite house called Graniittilinna. It has historically been the bar of the political left. While Lenin was hiding out in Finland planning the upcoming Russian revolution he was known to frequent Juttutupa; the table he used to sit at is kept in his memory (the one in the back with a good view of the entrance). On Wednesdays, there are often free Jazz concerts. Juttutupa also serves food from the neighbouring restaurant's kitchen. }} * {{drink | name=Bar Kalliohovi | alt= | url= | email= | address=Vaasankatu 17 | lat=60.18850 | long=24.95698 | directions= | phone=+358 50-382-9283 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M–Th 14:00–02:00, F 14:00–04:00, Sa 12:00–04:00, Su 12:00–02:00 | price= | content= }} * {{drink | name=Kurvitar | alt= | url= | email=info.ravintolakurvitar@gmail.com | address=Hämeentie 58-60 | lat=60.18867 | long=24.96342 | directions= | phone=+358 44-988-1078 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Su–Th 10:00–02:00, F Sa 10:00–05:00 | price= | content= }} * {{drink | name=Lepakkomies | alt= | url=https://www.facebook.com/lepakkomies.baari/ | email= | address=Helsinginkatu 1 | lat=60.18776 | long=24.95959 | directions= | phone=+358 9 713-455 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=12:00-02:00 | price=Free entry to bar, but entrance fee for club nights. Beer starting from €4 | content=The name translates to "bat-man" but the place is hardly themed after Batman, instead after bats in general. A large establishment in two floors, the ground floor functioning as your average Kallio pub, the basement as a venue for club nights. }} * {{drink | name=Mascot | alt= | url=http://www.mascotbar.fi/ | email= | address=Neljäs linja 2 | lat=60.18163 | long=24.95401 | directions=300 m from the Hakaniemi metro station | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=15:00-02:00 | price= | lastedit=2015-02-23 | content=A large and comfortable pub in Kallio. Rough-edge decor typical of Kallio. Nice summer terrace. }} * {{drink | name=Musta kissa | alt= | url=http://www.barmustakissa.fi/ | email= | address=Toinen linja 15 | lat=60.18241 | long=24.94695 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Daily 17:00–02:00 | price= | content=The name translates to "black cat". A popular bar among young and beautiful expats and their Finnish friends. Often nights with alternative DJs, awesome live music, performances and experimental art. }} * {{drink | name=Pub Fairytale | alt= | url=https://www.instagram.com/fairytale6969/ | email= | address=Helsinginkatu 7 A | lat=60.18752 | long=24.95735 | directions=in Kallio district | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Daily 16:00–02:00 | price= | content=A small but cosy gay bar. It has daily happy hour and free internet access available, with regular events like karaoke nights and bear art exhibitions. }} * {{drink | name=Pub Pressapari | alt= | url= | email= | address=Wallininkatu 10 | lat=60.18492 | long=24.94318 | directions= | phone=+358 40-673-7894 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Su–Th 14:00–01:00, F Sa 14:00–02:00 | price= | content= }} * {{drink | name=Pääsky Pub | alt= | url= | email= | address=Pääskylänrinne 2 | lat=60.18737 | long=24.96592 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} * {{drink | name=Roskapankki | alt= | url= | email= | address=Helsinginkatu 20 | lat=60.18677 | long=24.95174 | directions=at the corner of Helsinginkatu and Kaarlenkatu | phone=+358 9 735-488 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=Daily 09:00–02:00 | price= | content=A Kallio institution. Part bar, part club and part café (with food served until 22:00) with a big terrace and weird décor and DJs and the occasional live gig in the evenings. Weekend DJ brunch 12:00-16:00, prepare to wait for a table though. }} * {{drink | name=Soittojuottola Om'pu | alt= | url=http://www.ompu.fi/ | email= | address=Siltasaarenkatu 15 | lat=60.18263 | long=24.94977 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} *{{drink | name=Toveri | url= | email= | address=Castreninkatu 3 | lat=60.18419 | long=24.94565 | directions= | phone=+358 9 753-3862 | tollfree= | fax= | hours=M-Th 17:00-01:00, F Sa 17:00-02:00 | price= | content=Small bar with various types of beer. It's been here in various forms since 1937, and is one of the prettiest bars in Kallio. }} * {{drink | name=Pub Westminster | alt= | url= | email= | address=Sturenkatu 49 | lat=60.19672 | long=24.96198 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours= | price= | content= }} ===Nightclubs=== * {{drink | name=Kuudes linja | alt= | url=http://www.kuudeslinja.com/ | email= | address=Hämeentie 13 | lat=60.18355 | long=24.95937 | directions=entrance from the inner court at Kaikukatu 4 | phone= | tollfree= | fax= | hours=W F Sa 22:00-04:00, Th 21:00–04:00 | price= | content=A live music oriented nightclub for the somewhat artsy crowd. Located in the Kallio district Kuudes linja usually offers more experimental and alternative music than the mainstream downtown clubs and also hosts electronic music parties. Arrive early to avoid queues on popular nights — admittance is not guaranteed once the place gets full. The weatherproof terrace in the courtyard is open during the summer – you can bring your own food to the terrace and cook it on their gas grill. }} ===Other=== * {{drink | name=Leblon Merihaka | alt= | url=https://www.facebook.com/Leblonmerihaka {{dead link|December 2020}} | email= | address=Sörnäisten Rantatie | lat=60.1821 | long=24.9628 | directions= | phone= | tollfree= | hours=May-Sep lunchtime to late if it's not raining | price= | lastedit=2019-07-25 | content=A kind of outdoor food court/bar, right at the seafront comprising a set of kiosks serving fast food (hamburgers, Middle Eastern among others), ice cream, beer and wine with a seating area in the middle.
